Email Marketing Services

Email that movesprospects toward a yes.

Automated sequences segmented by behavior and pipeline stage, not broadcast calendar. From first opt-in through post-sale retention, built to move people, not fill inboxes.

Start Your Email StrategyView Our Work

Opens look fine. Pipeline does not move.

Collecting emails is easy. Turning them into booked calls takes sequences built around how your buyers actually decide, not a broadcast calendar.

  • Monthly newsletters go out with no tie to where each subscriber is in the buying process.
  • Automation stops after welcome email one instead of nurturing over weeks.
  • Everyone gets the same message because lists were never segmented by interest or behavior.
  • Deliverability slips because lists were never cleaned or domains never warmed properly.

Automation mapped to your sales cycle

  • Welcome, nurture, and re-engagement flows tied to specific offers and buyer stages.
  • Segments by lead source, behavior, and engagement so copy stays relevant.
  • Tests on subject lines, send times, and CTAs to improve opens and clicks over time.
  • Deliverability setup: SPF, DKIM, DMARC, and list hygiene to protect inbox placement.

The Kinexus Email Revenue System

Behavioral sequences, deliverability discipline, and every flow tied to pipeline — not open-rate bragging.

Day 0
Day 3
Day 7
68%
CTA Button
Email Sequence
Open Rate
42%
01

Revenue infrastructure, not newsletters

Sequences built to move leads through decision stages toward booked calls. Not monthly blasts nobody reads.

02

Segmentation by behavior

What someone clicked, opened, or ignored determines what they get next. Not what list they landed on two years ago.

03

Deliverability first

List hygiene, SPF/DKIM, and sender reputation before we crank up volume. Inboxes matter more than open rate bragging.

04

Revenue attribution

Every sequence tied to pipeline contribution. Open rates are context, not the scoreboard.

Email Sequence Flow

Every email in the sequence serves a specific purpose, from welcome to close. Timed and tested for maximum engagement.

Welcome email + lead magnet delivery

Day 0

68%

Value email: educational content

Day 3

52%

Case study / social proof

Day 7

48%

Soft offer: book a call

Day 14

42%

Automation that runs 24/7.

Every trigger, action, and condition mapped so your email system works without manual intervention.

Welcome Sequences

Auto-responders that fire when someone subscribes or downloads a lead magnet

Active

Nurture Flows

Multi-touch sequences that educate, build trust, and create booking opportunities

Active

Abandoned Lead Flows

Recovery flows for partial form fills, unbooked calls, and nurture exits

Active

Lifecycle Triggers

Behavior-based emails based on opens, clicks, purchases, and inactivity

Active

The build process.

From strategy to live campaigns, every phase has a clear deliverable.

  1. Phase 1

    Audit & Strategy

    Review current email infrastructure, list health, and past performance. Map full lifecycle strategy.

    Full lifecycle strategy in week 1

  2. Phase 2

    Segmentation & Cleaning

    Slice audience by behavior and engagement. Remove inactives to protect sender reputation.

    Avg. 34% list health improvement

  3. Phase 3

    Campaign & Automation Build

    Welcome sequences, nurture workflows, abandoned cart flows. All tested before going live.

    5+ automated sequences per client

  4. Phase 4

    Design & Copy

    Every email designed to drive action, from subject line to CTA button.

    Avg. 42% open rate on campaigns

  5. Phase 5

    Test, Report & Optimize

    A/B test subject lines, send times, and formats. Weekly reports with clear recommendations.

    18% month-over-month revenue growth

What you get with email marketing

Everything from list strategy and automation builds to campaign copy and deliverability monitoring.

Scope of work

  • Email Strategy and Calendar

    Segmentation plan, send frequency, campaign themes, and automation map aligned to your funnel.

  • Automation Workflow Build

    Welcome series, nurture sequences, abandoned lead follow-ups, and post-sale retention flows.

  • Campaign Copy and Design

    Email copy, subject lines, and mobile-responsive templates for broadcasts and automations.

  • List Segmentation and Management

    Tags, segments, and suppression rules based on behavior, source, and engagement level.

  • A/B Testing Program

    Structured tests on subject lines, preview text, CTAs, and send times with documented results.

  • Performance and Deliverability Reporting

    Open rates, click rates, conversions, unsubscribes, and inbox placement monitoring monthly.

Proof it works

Trust signals from real client work, not vanity metrics.

Case Study

SaaS Platform

12,000 subscribers but only a single welcome email automated. Monthly newsletters averaged 22% opens with zero demo bookings attributed to email touchpoints.

42% average open rate on behavioral nurture sequences and demo booking rate up 180% after trigger-based flows tied to content engagement.

Read the full case study

avg. open rate · optimized sequences

+180%

revenue from automated flows · 90 days

Transparent Pricing

See what's included at each tier.

Fixed scope. No surprise fees on the invoice.

Common Questions

FAQ

What email platforms do you work with?>

We work with Klaviyo, ActiveCampaign, Mailchimp, HubSpot, Drip, ConvertKit, and most major ESPs. If you have a platform you're already invested in, we'll optimize it. If you're starting fresh, we'll recommend the best fit for your business model.

How do you grow my email list?>

List growth is a strategy, not an accident. We combine lead magnets, optimized opt-in forms, landing pages, and paid traffic integration to add qualified subscribers, not just raw volume that hurts your deliverability.

What open rates can I expect?>

Our average client sees 38% open rates against a 22% industry average. Results depend on list health, subject line strategy, and segmentation. We audit all of these before making any projections.

Do you handle copywriting and email design?>

Yes. Our team handles strategy, copy, and design for every campaign and sequence we build. You review and approve before anything sends. Most clients don't need to write a single word.

How often should I email my list?>

It depends on your audience and what you're selling. Most of our clients start at 2–4 emails per month and scale to weekly cadences once open rates confirm the list is engaged. We don't recommend frequency for frequency's sake. Every send has to earn its place.

Which email platforms do you work with?>

HubSpot, ActiveCampaign, Klaviyo, Mailchimp, and ConvertKit depending on your business and integrations. We recommend the best fit on a strategy call.

How much does email marketing management cost?>

Retainers run $2,000 to $5,000 per month based on list size, number of automations, and send frequency. New automation builds sometimes include a one-time onboarding fee.

How quickly can you launch email automations?>

Welcome and basic nurture sequences usually go live in 2 to 3 weeks. Full funnel automation with segmentation and multiple flows takes 4 to 6 weeks.

Can you improve our email deliverability?>

Yes. We audit SPF, DKIM, and DMARC, clean your list, warm new domains properly, and watch spam complaint rates. Most issues clear within 2 to 4 weeks of fixes.
